mapper.select: /* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.selectCountLectureStndtByPk */ select count(*) from t_lecture_stdnt where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and user_id=#{userId}
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.selectCountLectureStndtByPass */ select count(*) from t_lecture_stdnt where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and user_id=#{userId} and pass_yn = 'Y'
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.selectCountLectureByEduSeqGangsa */ select count(*) from t_lecture where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and instrctr_id=#{instrctrId}
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.selectCountLectureByEduSeqOrgCd */ select count(*) from t_lecture where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and org_cd=#{orgCd}
/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.useFeedbackCnt */ select count(*) from t_lecture where fb_idx = #{fbIdx}

/* com.educare.edu.comn.mapper.CheckMapper.selectCountLectureStndtByPassIdx */ select count(tls.edu_seq) from t_lecture_stdnt tls where 1=1 and edu_seq in (select edu_seq from t_lecture tl where tl.pass_idx=#{passIdx}) and cert_de <= (select cert_de from t_lecture_stdnt tls2 where tls2.user_id=#{userId} and edu_seq=#{eduSeq})
